channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Circumcision reparations — 84 replies — 336.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Circumcision reparations

Open thread • Replies: 84 • Updated: 2026-05-15 14:32 UTC

OP

All men who were circumcised as babies deserve at least 10 million USA dollars.
They were innocent babies and were horribly, permanently and irreversibly mutilated for their entire one life on earth before it even began.
There is NO way to FULLY or even MOSTLY recover their lost foreskins and all of it's structures. Stretching does not nearly even come close to restoring it to it's original form.

>Why at least 10 million usa dollars?

Because there was a case of a adult man who merely had some mean words, drawings and jokes said to him at work. Nothing criminally illegal like death threats, leaking his social security number etc. He later quit his job at Tesla he wasn't fired. He was offered 15 million 2022 dollars for his hurt feelings by a usa judge https://www.nbcnews.com/business/business-news/tesla-racism-lawsuit-worker-rejects-15-million-payout-rcna34655
He was literally offered 15 million dollars that the government would take from Tesla and hand directly to him. He rejected it because he wanted more then 15 million 2022 dollars but the point stands the government is willing to say mean words and hurt feelings are worth at least 15 million 2022 dollars.
Being circumcised as a baby is AT LEAST ten times worse so a mere ten million dollars per mutilated at birth man is already a deep deep compromise.

Early replies (first 3)

62230647
>>62230645
CASE #2

https://www.usatoday.com/story/money/2023/07/20/mcdonalds-lawsuit-hot-chicken-nugget/70436203007/

A random family is in a car. These are not employees they're just random customers.
They go to McDonalds drive through

Mom buys nuggets

Gives nuggets (corpses of tortured and mutilated animals that were factory farmed) to her little kid

Kid drops nugget on thigh and it sits on her thigh for a few minutes or so while mother is distracted.

It leaves a slight burn on thigh

Burn heals completely leaving a small barely noticable and not painful scar on thigh

Girl gets 800,000 dollars.

Circumcising a baby is at least 13 times worse easily.
It's obviously way way worse than 13 times but whatever let's be extremely conservative

That's just over 10 million usa dollars

You deserve this.

ROUTINE CIRCUMCISION OF BABY BOYS IS BATTERY!! It is non consensual touching which is medically unnecessary. This is actually legally correct at least in usa as intactivist lawyers have argued

GUESS What? A battery can be worth 5 million dollars or more

Circumcision is doing severe permanent irreversible physical damage to an innocent baby boy . Possible severe mental damage too

A hedge fund executive punched a parking attendant once during a dispute over a car.

62230660
>>62230647
The Injuries: A broken cheekbone and a concussion. The victim recovered physically within months, but sued for emotional distress and battery.

The Verdict: The jury awarded $1.2 million for medical bills and pain, but added $7 million in punitive damages specifically because of the defendant’s wealth and the "predatory" nature of the assault.

This is the classic "regular guy" example often cited in legal circles.

The Incident: A man was punched once by a security guard at a Las Vegas nightclub.

The Injuries: A broken jaw and a concussion. No permanent disability, but the victim required surgery (his jaw was wired shut for weeks).

The Result: A jury awarded him $4.75 million.

$5 Million (Carroll v. Trump)

While there was a later $83 million verdict for defamation, the original 2023 verdict for the battery itself was $5 million.

The Incident: A single encounter in a department store dressing room.

The Injuries: No "super severe" physical injuries (like broken bones or hospitalization), but the jury focused on the psychological trauma.

The Result: The $5 million award was for the act of battery and the associated pain and suffering.

If Carroll can get 5 million then so should men circumcised as boys

Not everyone would instantly become a multimillionaire No circumcision reparations for women

Tens of millions of men would be given millions of dollars printed into existence. Yes it would cause inflation. That's okay. BRING THE DIGITAL CURRENCY OR TEN THOUSAND DOLLAR USA BILLS AND ONE HUNDRED THOUSAND DOLLARS USA BILLS NOW

100 USA DOLLAR BILL WON'T EVEN BUY YOU A SODA AND THAT IS OKAY

If bread costs 10,000 dollars a loaf that's fine. It's the uncircumcised who didn't get reparations who won't be able to afford bread at first. They can work for a circumcised person who got reparations for 15,000 dollars an hour or something

https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=WWVz_DcSeZc

62230666
>>62230645
Consider yourself lucky your dick doesnt stink. Its like having a vagina as a man. And thats coming from someone uncut.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62232353
Americans are a strange, weird breed indeed.

62232370
>>62232027
You are gay. If removing taste buds made you less likely to put cocks in your mouth, I would be all for it. You. Are. Gay.

62232399
>>62232353
I know
I am technically American because I was born here but I hate it here

62232413
>>62232399
You have to go back

62232432
>>62232413
troll

62232631
>>62232432
Tongue my balls faggot. I tithe to my church. I tip 20% minimum. I give to charity. I volunteer at the animals shelter. What do you? Besides suck dicks?

62232642
>>62232631
What charities? What church? Does the animal shelter have mostly dogs and cats in it and are those pets fed a diet of mostly the bodies of other animals that were tortured in factory farms?

62232647
>>62232642

62232655
>>62232647

62232685
>>62232642

62232692
>>62232642
>what church
The only church

62232710
>>62232647
You've motivated me to quit factory-farmed pork. I've been thinking about it for a while.

62232712
>>62230645
honestly this should be a real thing

62232719
>>62231645
>Circumcision started because men started having major dick infection from never washing their dick.
It actually started as a tool of branding and sexual control for slaves by jews, then evolved into a ritual blood sacrifice for jews themselves, then eventually the jews thought it would be awesome to inflict this sadistic blood ritual on the rest of the world. At no point was it done 'for cleanliness'. Just watch the eric clopper thing if you really care about the history of it, you won't because you're just here to spread cutlet cope

62232721
>>62232710
>Caging: They are kept in small cages where they have to stand on painful metal all day.

>Squalor: They must live in filth and feces, inhaling acidic ammonia all day. >When people go into factory farms, they often describe it as the worst smelling place they have ever encountered.

>Wounds: These nasty conditions combined with violence from other animals (triggered by the aforementioned conditions) mean that animals often have festering open wounds. Pigs bite at the tails of those in front of them—hens savagely peck at each other, causing serious wounds. Most chickens have burns on their legs from lying in feces all day.

>Mutilation: Pigs have their tails cut off and are castrated without anesthethic. chickens have their beaks sliced off with a knife; lambs have a rubber band tied around their testicles until their testicles die. Beef cows are also dehorned and disbudded with a hot iron of around 750 degrees, many times hotter than standard ovens.

62232725
>>62232692
Eastern Orthodox? Or the one with infallible contradictions

62232731
>>62232721
Pork and beef are actually some of the least bad animal products

62232753
Any argument for circumcision can be applied tenfold over to mammary tissue removal. Tits are just flaps of skin. Breast cancer kills 100000x more than penile cancer does. And nobody needs breastmilk since the official medical posture is that formula is just as good. We could save 10s of thousands of lives in america every year with forced, routine breast tissue removal for infant girls.

>>62231831
>caring so much what women think that you lett a "doctor" rape and mutilate your infant son
Holy cucked

62232762
>>62232027
honestly, if you had your taste buds removed and never knew what food tasted like and could effortlessly stay thin your entire life, you probably wouldn't feel shafted

62232954
Bump

62232960
>>62232731
Those are not the eggs I buy ofc

62234482
Based OP

62234901
>>62230645
>But anon I'm circumcised and broke

I know and you deserve better. Immediately quit your wagie job. You should never contribute to circumcisers. You deserve to be very comfortably retired NOW. A circumciser should not be richer than you unless they are bezos or musk. You should be almost infinitely richer than every american woman (circumcision is illegal in USA) unless she's Mackenzie bezos. She should be working a wagie job and serving you.

>But but but if I quit my wagie job and stop helping circumcisers I'll become homeless and have no money!!

Maybe or maybe not. Doesn't matter don't be a pussy.

In Minecraft if you want to be the ultimate Minecraft neet

Get a bow and arrows
Get a chest
Get a small shovel
Get a Minecraft mod to get Silica Gel Packets Desiccant things they only cost a few emeralds in the mod
Go to a place NOT NEAR YOUR BASE if someone makes it so you can't even go within 500 blocks of your base you still need to be able to access your chest
Dig a deep hole

Put bow and arrow, at least a couple hundred emeralds and the Silica Gel Packets Desiccant things in your chest. Optionally also add stuff like a small sword.
Close chest up very tightly.
Put chest at bottom of hole and cover with dirt blocks.
WHEN YOU GO TO SPOT WHERE YOU WILL BURY THE CHEST LEAVE YOUR MAP AND COMPASS AT YOUR BASE DON'T BRING THEM WITH YOU. IF YOU HAVE A PHONE MOD OR MODERN CAR MOD DON'T BRING THOSE WITH YOU EITHER

final step

If you ever become homeless or whatever in Minecraft go dig up your chest and do PvP before jumping into lava

If you are making a stash in Minecraft don't bury it at your Minecraft base you live at in game bury it somewhere like a public park in the Minecraft server and make sure you bury it somewhere easy to find like next to some sort of landmark in the server.
Make sure to keep in mind how deep you bury it like how many blocks and what the frost line is if you have the frost line mod installed on the server.

62234915
>>62234901
I wasn't exaggerating at all being circumcised is at least 100 times worse then mean words you volunteerly endure (you can quit job at any time) and at least 30 times worse then that girls burn

all circumcisers don't get reparations. That includes doctors who perform surgeries as well as parents among others.

Millions of dollars for the irreversible damages must be the priority.
No circumcised man should have to choose between wage slavery and homelessness while their are circumcisers who are rich enough they can comfortably retire young.

YOU DESERVE MILLIONS ACT LIKE IT

QUIT YOUR JOB IMMEDIATELY.

REPARATIONS OR RETRIBUTION

There are young woman with completely intact genetalia who have never been mutilated in their lives who are very wealthy and are comfortably retired.
THERE are men who had their genitals seriously mutilated permanently and irreversibly as babies who are poor and working jobs they hate to serve those women because if they don't work they'll become homeless.

Quit your job today.
Play Minecraft if you must.
You deserve to be a multimillionaire today

62234925
>>62234915
Blame parents
Doctors
Nurses
Police
Hospitals
Judges
Politicians
Lawyers
Etc

Living as a circumcised male makes sense if you are worth tens of millions of dollars and otherwise reasonably healthy

I don't want to focus too much on legality.
Morally we deserve it even if morality is subjective.
They're hypocrites for not giving us our millions each
We are justified to seek justice ourselves

Circumcised men need to understand they're totally justified in not working at all and taking as much welfare as they want

And if they become homeless for not working they should play Minecraft at the public library computer

>Also work for muslim ?

Maybe but again they can't be circumcising others
If they're promoting Islam they're promoting circumcising babies
So only ex Muslims who were circumcised as children and are vocally anti Islam and have been since they were young

If you are circumcised and you have a sibling that is uncircumcised you deserve full inheritance from your parents for mutilating you.
You had to suffer more if they wanna do 50/50 play minecraft, you are perfectly justified and I, for one, will praise you. Men need to grow balls again, yeah Minecraft is scary, but living as a cripple who isn't rich and has to work is miserable and humiliating.

I plan to get rich though investing/gambling
I will not contribute to society in any way I only want to steal

Circumcising girls is illegal. Circumcising boys is legal in every country on earth.
Circumcising girls is illegal in most.

Make them care

Give us what we deserve or we play Minecraft

Spartans fought guys off outnumbered 7 to 1

62234933
>>62234925
Not everyone would instantly become a multimillionaire
No reparations for women
Reparations only for circumcised men who haven't helped circumcise others

Circumcised innocent men would become much wealthier then those who are intact or who circumcised others.

Tens of millions of men would be given millions of dollars printed into existence.
Yes it would cause inflation. That's okay.
The circumcised who haven't circumcised others deserve to be wealthier then the intact and or circumsirers

Boomers who circumcised babies SHOULD have their retirement savings inflated out of existence.
Sorry boomer retirement is over for you now you must go back to work or be homeless.
Time for gen z to take it easy

BRING THE DIGITAL CURRENCY OR TEN THOUSAND DOLLAR USA BILLS AND ONE HUNDRED THOUSAND DOLLARS USA BILLS NOW

100 USA DOLLAR BILL WON'T EVEN BUY YOU A SODA AND THAT IS OKAY

If bread costs 200 dollars a loaf that's fine.
It's the uncircumcised who didn't get reparations who won't be able to afford bread at first.
They can work for a circumcised person who got reparations for 400 dollars an hour or something

https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=WWVz_DcSeZc [Open]

He wasn't even arrested. He wasn't even handcuffed. If he can get millions of dollars why can't I?

62234947
>>62234933
>And just who will fund this?

The government's infinite money printers.
Also confiscate wealth from circumcisers and make them homeless.
Oprah Winfrey makes cream from baby foreskins she should be homeless

If someone offered me 150 million dollars or my original foreskin back I'd take the foreskin in a heartbeat. Since that is no longer an option I will have to settle for just the 150 million dollars instead. If I don't get either of those I'm playing Minecraft.

>silica gel packets from the silica gel mod

You can buy them from villagers or online if you have the online shopping mod they're really cheap you can also find them in potion bottles I think.

62234960
>itt: people obsessed with penises
Go back to /pol/ with your dickskin thread fag.
Didn't realize I had to apply those filters for /biz/ too.

62235214
>one shot at life
>shabbos goy parents instantly chop off dick

62235313
>>62235214
it’s an eternal torture stain from the day you are born as an innocent baby
Life will never be as good as it could have been after the cutting has happened

Maybe this is why people cope with karma and you did something bad in your previous life to deserve it. But that undermines free will so karma is bullshit

item.title: Bitcoin or altcoins? — 101 replies — 83.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Bitcoin or altcoins?

Open thread • Replies: 101 • Updated: 2026-05-15 13:31 UTC

OP

If you had to pick, what would you buy right now: BTC or altcoins? I’m not seeing much ROI in alts lately, even utility or memecoins.

Early replies (first 3)

62195293
>>62195275
Bitcoin until 120k

62195300
you can't time the market I thought like >>62195293
last time, bitcoin to 70k and sell half and go into alts and then 2021 alts just fucking died for a year.

The alts that pumped are things that haven't gone parabolic yet, or big projects like Solana with glowie money attached to them. Ones like Link are not going to 1000 regardless of cope.

/biz/ will pretty much only give you bad info too. I've found maybe 3 coins here that were Guaranteed returns, everything else I had to research myself. In fact I remember last year posting proof that CRCL stock was going to 10x on IPO and got XRP schizos fudding me out of taking a life changing position.

I actually hate the fuck out of baggies.

62195373
>>62195293
Why 120k only?? Why not 1M?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62211429
>>62211194
hbar going down to 2c before it ever gets a chance at real traction

62211440
>>62195275
>Chainlink is the future

62211870
>>62211440
Hahaha

62211903
>>62195275
Everyone moved to BTC of course, I dumped my ETH for BTC too, I used to hold BTC because of staking but now I can stake BTC natively thanks to TBV and the likes

62211915
>>62195275
I’d rather keep stacking BTC, then put it to work via native staking / yield layers (like Babylon-style setups) instead of chasing dead charts and hoping for a narrative pump.

62211928
>>62209385
Ok as you say so

62211932
>>62211429
Hbar is okay to hold and buy

62212034
>>62195275
More potential upside on alts for the next six months. Specifically memes right now.

62213245
>>62211440
What's your price target anon?

62214696
>>62211932
All in or?

62216973
>>62211915
It's worth considering anon

62216987
>>62195275

Polkadot

62220595
>>62209854
Are you sure?

62224657
>>62216987
Why polkadot?

62224666
cny/usd is > .147 now w/trump headed to china. every penny that can chase risk on is gonna get horned up immediately. The ONLY thing the US has left is the dollar as a w3@p0n. Plus, i can't afford any more makers mark bottles unless my alts start pumping w/haste, so...

62224894
>>62224666
Crazy

62224972
>>62224666
We're cooked

62226444
>>62224666
Risk-on driven by geopolitics, liquidity, and alcoholism. Peak crypto posting.

62228393
>>62216987
>ICP

62228841
chainlink

62229090
>>62216987
he's also pedo

62232214
>>62228393
And why

62232231
>>62195275
>buying the top of the bull trap
Never change, /biz/

62232233
>>62195275
Alts
If I'm already going for a risky meme-asset like crypto I might as well go for broke. Bitcoin already had its big run, now it's just stock market levels of gains with far greater risk.

62232268
>>62232231
Also, this threads riddled with bots holy shit

62232289
>>62195275
Altcoins for profit, Bitcoin for stable investments.

62233740
>>62228841
I'm not holding this

62234251
>>62232289
Bitcoin for your grandchildren

62234320
>>62195275
BTC

62234907
>>62234320
It's solana

item.title: >never had a gf >never been on a date >now 36 >had jobs >go to gym >finally lose weight and have a BMI less than 25 >mak… — 62 replies — 83.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
>never had a gf >never been on a date >now 36 >had jobs >go to gym >finally lose weight and have a BMI less than 25 >mak…

Open thread • Replies: 62 • Updated: 2026-05-15 13:59 UTC

OP

>never had a gf
>never been on a date
>now 36
>had jobs
>go to gym
>finally lose weight and have a BMI less than 25
>make multiple dating profiles on different apps
>zero matches

So I'm a confirmed subhuman. And, judging by the responses to ugly males who post their pics on Reddit and ask why they get no matches, normies openly laugh at me and think I deserve a low status life of slavery.

Why should I give a fuck about putting in effort at work or saving the west or whatever? Any sort of participation is a scam for someone like me.

Early replies (first 3)

62223666
>>62223664
>>>/adv/

62223769
>>62223664
depends how tall u are and if u have any real ugliness causing things like deformity or burn scars etc.

U probably are just average looking and if u arent 5'4'' u will find a gf

62224072
>>62223664
are you swiping on fat women or only the stacies?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62232990
Post your pics. You need a full spectrum of pictures. A mix of ones out with friends, you alone dressed up and ones dressed casual, a hobby of yours, etc. It sounds exhausting but if you’re living life right you should have a few. Women are going to imagine themselves in your lifestyle and if all your pictures are car selfies and pictures in a gym mirror shes going to think you’re boring. Women hate nothing more than they hate BORING

62232992
>>62231883
my obese balding friend actually got occasional tinder dates but they were ALWAYS with ugly obese women

you have to date in your league. whenever someone says they get literally zero matches i know they are going for 5/10's when they should be going for 1/10's and 2/10's.

62233004
>>62231869
no shit dumbass. if youve had meaningless sex with 50 women you've fried your brain romantically

62233012
kill fat people

62233014
bro online dating is HORRIBLE. Unless you're like the top 5% of hot guys out there it's gonna be a depressing humiliation ritual. You prob have to hire a professional photographer and make it look like you have a vibrant, exciting life with a bunch of staged pics. I used shitty selfies a decade ago, but now it doesnt cut it.

62233017
>>62233014
this. If not a chad you need to be fully optimized with pics and lifestyle. Otherwise irl, which probably means 1 girl opportunity every few months otherwise you spoil the well

62233024
>>62232652
This
It’s sickening once you look into it.
Women at large are getting blamed when half the women on there are fake profiles anyway. There’s plenty of fake men’s profiles now too, dedicated to romance scams. Which is a whole other issue, men and women being victims

62233040
>>62233017
>that ugly guy with super polished tryhard profile

this unironically gives girls the ick

62233064
>>62233040
they get the ick from the guy being ugly. Selecting photos where he looks most attractive is only going to help compared to bathroom selfies. If he does that he'll get 0 matches guaranteed.

62233065
>>62233040
If hes ugly they already have the ick

62233066
>>62233065
exactly. The most important tip is don't be ugly. 2nd is don't be autistic as fuck. 3rd actually talk to girls whether online or irl whatever.

62233115
>>62223664
Dating apps arent for dating they're for sluts to get their holes blown out by a small selection of chads and fuckbois.

62233200
>>62233115
>chads
>fuckbois
what's the difference?

62233241
>>62233200
Chads don't have to try because their appearance does everything. Fuckbois have to try hard to get women to fuck them. They still have fuck but the level of effort is completely different.

62233271
>>62223664
I posted my face on soc once when I was drunk.

Everyone gave me an 7 or 8/10. I still feel ugly though.

62233283
>>62231723
5/10 roasties only swipe on 8+

62233302
>>62233283
/thread

All women swipe 3+ points up. If you're only attracting morbidly obese women, down syndrome women and old fat single mothers, you're an above average looking guy.

These studies have already been done 1,000 times. Average looking guys get 1 match a month abs it's usually a fake/bot account or a 300+ pound clown with 20 fishhooks in its face.

62233310
>>62223664
your ugly ancestors got pussy somehow and so can you

62233355
>>62223664
Remember, for every beautiful person, there must be 5 ugly ones.

I don't make the rules.

62233408
>>62223664
Why do you want a girlfriend? If you want to LOVE a woman you are gay, sorry to tell you. You need to start niggermaxxing, learn to pump and dump

62233456
>>62223664
Go to Philippines, Moldova, or Gambia, depending on what race you prefer. You'll get more girlfriends than you know what to do with.

I'd post some pix of hot bare-titties Himba girls but the jannies get all assblasted about that for some reason.

62233560
>>62232980
>Where in person did you meet your wife?
GF of a friend introduced me to her.
This strategy requires having friends, I know that's too much to ask of GenZ nowadays.

62233715
>>62233271
i never posted on soc but i did on the site photofeeler where people rate your pic. Out of 120 rates i averaged to a 3/10

which makes sense since im khv at 30. I am way too scared to post my face on this site though thats crazy

62233733
you can't be this naive at 36, its surprising how many manchildren there are in the west still chasing dating and love and marriage when your zoomer generation have figured it out for the scam that it is

62233792
>>62233733
yep, one of the most popular streamers smashes his face with a hammer... lmfao

all of this was figured out over a decade ago but no one wanted to listen.

62234041
>>62232735
>social pariah wonders why he's not surrounded by a harem of qt3.14s
many such cases

62234043
>>62233715
I'm 32 and a virgin. Just dick in pussy/ass virgin. I've done everything else. Also 6'3" and slender/fit.

62234052
Maybe you shouldn't spend so much time around permavirgins (reddit)

62234972
>>62233241
oh, I guess I'm a fuckboi. I've optimized everything possible and fuck a lot. I also live in a small town and have chicks drive 70 miles to my place on the regular for a first meetup. Got one tonight and another next Thurs for a "sleepover"

>>62233283
They do but eventually they run out of those dudes or they don't followup with meeting up. Sub8s wont see the chicks who just signed up for the apps but they'll likely see her after a few months. She'll humble herself after these dudes just pump and dump them over and over and they start going for the charming less attractive guy who ultimately just fucks and dumps then anyway, then they go for true beta bucks after that.

>>62233310
there werent many options back then and girls needed a guy for survival. Now every girl has the world at her fingertips and their own money.

>>62233456
yea this is the only option for a sub5 guy or mgtow

>>62233560
Yea your way is the best. I had a few of those situation but I never liked the girl enough or she had to move for college etc unfortunately. It really comes down to luck.

>>62233733
>chasing dating and love
this was exciting when I was a teenager. As an adult it's only fun to pump and dump. I do think love can exist if you find a good woman to build a family with though.

62235106
>>62223664
Bro stop using apps. Also those things you listed are no substitute for being able to competently speak to and entertain women. It is, unfortunately, a learned skill. You have to practice. A good way to learn is to flirt with women a little older than you. They typically like the attention from a younger man and are more forgiving of missteps.

item.title: You should be holding at least 1 BTC. — 87 replies — 70.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
You should be holding at least 1 BTC.

Open thread • Replies: 87 • Updated: 2026-05-15 13:30 UTC

OP

Imagine not owning at least 1 BTC before institutions and governments vacuum the remaining supply while you’re still debating if Bitcoin is a scam… or just trading crypto without considering BTC long term.

Early replies (first 3)

62219945
>>62219942
Or I can trade alts (leveraged BTC) and actually make it instead of getting a 2x pump

62219995
Fuck. I have 2BTC . Is that enough bro?

62220027
>>62219995
no, i have 3. and it's not enough, we're just poor faggots

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62229561
>>62229551
What about forex?

62229570
>>62229557
Yeah, don't think I'm getting kids anytime soon and blew it with one of the few women I might had.
>>62229561
I'm an europoor and i don't do forex trading. I just hold and dca my wagie paycheck, but BTC has been shit this whole market run. And yes the opportunity cost once again is making no sense. Why not pile everything into boomer stocks, better risk and reward after all. I might need to diversify my bags and forget about Bitcoin for a while.
Godspeed

62229578
>>62229570
Be loyal ser and start a good family

62230004
I'm all in StrategyInc tho

62230021
>>62219942
What's supposed to be happening in the op pic

62231066
>>62225044
I got jewed of my own dip, gf was home all day yesterday and i didn't buy.
I hate women so much is unbelievable

62231072
>>62229557
Why though anon? It’s not like this is some random vaporware project. They already have partnerships with names like GoMining, Ledger, a16zcrypto and others around the ecosystem.

62231081
>>62230004
Why all in? : (

62231090
>>62229433
Good advice so far.

62232211
>>62222594
There's solution for this

62233500
>>62231072
is that legit?

62233508
>>62231066
You hate woman because you like man. Gayish bitcoiner

62233709
>>62233500
Yeah anon. There’s already almost 51k BTC staked in the protocol too, which is like $4B+ worth of BTC already participating around the ecosystem.

62233716
>>62223021
You can always keep slowly adding over time anon. Most people don’t even have close to 1 BTC.

62233736
>>62224655
it will be your opportunity as well.

62233806
>>62229570
I'm from Spain and I live well. Got small biz + doing crypto + forex + stocks. Life is good.

62233821
>>62233709
never though there's protocol exists like this

62233827
>buy btc
buy link
buy ICP
buy avax

62233835
>>62228833
And Ethereum is the godess

62233840
>>62228631
Hes just a homosexual and fears for the virginity of his anus

62233880
>>62233827

worst trash available
>UNGMI

62233986
>>62233821
Yeah anon, it already exists but I think a lot of people just still aren’t paying attention to the newer BTCFi infra yet. And it’s still pretty early too since the TBVs haven’t even launched yet, which should unlock even more native BTC use cases.

62233993
>>62225388
See this anon?

62233997
>>62224679
The funniest part is you probably think debasing fiat printed out of thin air is somehow more “real” than a globally traded asset with trillions in liquidity.

62234000
>>62230021
Gonna be dead broke without BTC lol.

62234021
>>62233806
Aren't you fucked with taxes and DAC8 now, I cannot buy anymore via a cex here

62234099
>>62233840
It sucks being gay

62234109
>>62234021
do the alternative. Privacy

62234248
>>62234021
Government is shit.

62234899
>>62233986
I don’t think that’s enough when ETH literally lives and dies by DeFi activity.

item.title: Crypto is no more — 5 replies — 20.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Crypto is no more

Open thread • Replies: 5 • Updated: 2026-05-15 14:32 UTC

OP

AI stole the hype from crypto and by EOY we're going to witness the greatest crash ever.
Of course, it will be a good time to buy then, but for now stay out of this market.

Early replies (first 3)

62234527
>>62234481
proof??

62234532
>>62234527
He knows the future and thats why hes a trillionaire

62234653
>>62234532
omg

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62234709
>>62234481
AI will inevitably integrate with distributed networks. Cryptocurrencies like Doge and Litecoin may become worthless, but ones tied to computation and storage are going to the moon.

62235311
>>62234709
No they won't.

item.title: US 10 year yield is at a 51 week high. Bonds are being sold off at a fast pace globally. Is Trumpy going to release some… — 10 replies — 8.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
US 10 year yield is at a 51 week high. Bonds are being sold off at a fast pace globally. Is Trumpy going to release some…

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-05-15 13:29 UTC

OP

US 10 year yield is at a 51 week high.
Bonds are being sold off at a fast pace globally.
Is Trumpy going to release some kind of new later today to bring the yields back down?

Early replies (first 3)

62234581
>>62234575
Bery burish saaar infinite growth wberribodi bins china trump elun musk videocards yay!

62234594
>>62234575
Based, I’ve got some tbills maturing in the next month

62234615
>>62234594
What's your strategy? Bonds are becoming worthless.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62234619
>>62234575
We're hyperinflating, fixed income isn't attractive at these rates.

62234630
>>62234619
That's my worry. What good is a 5% bond when inflation is 8%?

62234645
>>62234615
I’m about 50% in bonds just defraying inflation waiting for cheapies like every good bobo. I’ve diversified slightly away from US stocks but the clown parade is still going so I’m still mostly in VOO. I don’t do individual stocks, just indexes. Small crypto bag, not a huge part of my poorfolio

62234664
>>62234575
bigger picture

62234764
What does this mean for retards like me?
Stonks go up or down? Have cash too and it's inflating away but don't want to buy ath.

62234873
>>62234764
Borrowing money becomes more expensive for the government and for anyone else.
It's bearish short term but the government will print money and buy its own debt to lower the interest rate.
This is very inflationary, so bullish long term imo

62234888
>>62234764
Bond yields go up when demand for US debt goes down, which is a bearish indicator. Higher bond yields mean higher borrowing costs for companies, higher mortgage rates, etc. Debt becomes more expensive to finance, which throttles growth down.

item.title: holy FUCK — 2 replies — 8.0/hr
item.content:encoded:

Open thread • Replies: 2 • Updated: 2026-05-15 14:36 UTC

62235318
>>62234821
/biz/ is weird in that sometimes it has the stupidest fucking takes imaginable and then other times it has been 100% spot on with all of its calls with no misses. I got quite a good TQQQ tip the other day that I rode.

I think enabling country flags would go a long way to solving this issue.

62235334
>>62234821

I love /smg/
